title: Lab result review

red_flags.text: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.
red_flags.rationale: Supports documenting review of laboratory reports and medication context for listed chronic conditions only.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21

investigations.text: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.
investigations.rationale: Supports clinician review of condition-linked laboratory results and comparison against monitoring context without supplying autonomous interpretation.
investigations.evidence_extract: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21

source_limitations: No exact UAE guideline for a broad all-purpose laboratory-result review workflow was identified.
Critical-value interpretation, trend interpretation, arbitrary result explanation, referral, and further testing remain unsupported.
The selected source is telehealth- and chronic-condition-specific.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
